TEXT.citation: Rau, D. V., & Dong, M. N. (2006). Yami texts with reference grammar and dictionary. Institute of Linguistics, Academia Sinica.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{rau2006yami, title={Yami texts with reference grammar and dictionary}, author={Rau, D Victoria and Dong, Maa-Neu}, year={2006}, publisher={Institute of Linguistics, Academia Sinica}}
TEXT.source: ['2. mapakazakazakat a yalalaw so sinsi', '裝死嚇老師', 'Faking death to scare the teacher', '', 'si apen Kotan/Jinovoy (M, 75, Yayo)', '王仁德，男，75，椰油村', '']

S.FORM: a noka-pi-vat-vatek namen rana, manga ka-kteh am, "mi ta na mi-vat-vatek" koan ko si apen Sidongen am,
S.PHON: a no~uka-pi-vat-vatək namən rana, maŋa ka-ktəʁ am, "mi ta na mi-vat-vatək" ko~uan ko~u ʂi apən ʂiɖo~uŋən am,
S.FORM: a nokapivatvatek namen rana, manga kakteh am, "mi ta na mivatvatek" koan ko si apen Sidongen am,
S.PHON: a no~ukapifatfatək namən ɻana, maŋa kaktəɰ am, "mi ta na mifatfatək" ko~uan ko~u ɕi apən ɕiɖo~uŋən am,
S.TRANSL: 這故事是我們學生時代的故事。有一天我對si apen Sidongen說，＂我們要去上學了＂
This story is from our student days. One day, I said to si apen Sidongen, "Let's go to school!"

W.TRANSL: 當.以前-動綴-疊-學生時代

S.FORM: "nohon", ma-ngay namen a, k-ian namen rana do pi-vate-vatek-an a,
S.PHON: "no~uʁo~un", ma-ŋaj namən a, k-ian namən rana ɖo~u pi-vatə-vatək-an a,
S.FORM: "nohon", mangay namen a, kian namen rana do pivatevatekan a,
S.PHON: "no~uɰo~un", maŋaj namən a, kian namən ɻana ɖo~u pifatəfatəkan a,
S.TRANSL: ＂好＂ 。我們就一起去上學，然後就到了學校
"Okay." and we went to school. Then we got to school.

S.FORM: tateng am, na-nao-en na yamen am, ikong to ko á-tenng-i,
S.PHON: tatəŋ am, na-nao~u-ən na jamən am, iko~uŋ to~u ko~u *-tənŋ-i,
S.FORM: tateng am, nanaoen na yamen am, ikong to ko atenngi,
S.PHON: tatəŋ am, nanao~uən na jamən am, iko~uŋ to~u ko~u atənŋi,
S.TRANSL: 老師開始上課教我們，老師說＂ （講日語） ＂，我哪裡懂什麼？
The teacher, who was Japanese, started off the class in Japanese, and I could not understand.

S.FORM: "ángay rana jito, ta ya ka tey-má-teneng" koan na yaken am, simzod-an na rana do atang ko a,
S.PHON: "*ŋaj rana ʥito~u, ta ja ka təj-m*-tənəŋ" ko~uan na jakən am, ʂimʐo~uɖ-an na rana ɖo~u ataŋ ko~u a,
S.FORM: "angay rana jito, ta ya ka teymateneng" koan na yaken am, simzodan na rana do atang ko a,
S.PHON: "aŋaj ɻana ʥito~u, ta ja ka təjmatənəŋ" ko~uan na jakən am, ɕimɻo~uɖan na ɻana ɖo~u ataŋ ko~u a,
S.TRANSL: 老師對我說＂你過來！因為你太聰明了（意反）＂ ，一去就被打了屁股
"Come here, smarty-pants." he said, and then spanked me when I got there.

S.FORM: mi-'oya-'oya ko am, to ko rakép-a jia o si-sipzot na am, to namen mi-pi-pázang-i a,
S.PHON: mi-ʔo~uja-ʔo~uja ko~u am, to~u ko~u rak*p-a ʥia o~u ʂi-ʂipʐo~ut na am, to~u namən mi-pi-p*ʐaŋ-i a,
S.FORM: mi'oya'oya ko am, to ko rakepa jia o sisipzot na am, to namen mipipazangi a,
S.PHON: miʔo~ujaʔo~uja ko~u am, to~u ko~u ɻakəpa ʥia o~u ɕiɕipɻo~ut na am, to~u namən mipipaɻaŋi a,
S.TRANSL: 我一氣，就奪走他手上的木棒（教鞭）。我們就扯來扯去的（搶棒子）
I was very angry, so I tried to take away his stick. We fought over it for a while.

S.FORM: ana! tang a, o sinsi am, to maci-pázang-i do si-sipzot na, ta i-ka-teneng mo o ri,
S.PHON: ana! taŋ a, o~u ʂinʂi am, to~u maci-p*ʐaŋ-i ɖo~u ʂi-ʂipʐo~ut na, ta i-ka-tənəŋ mo~u o~u ri,
S.FORM: ana! tang a, o sinsi am, to macipazangi do sisipzot na, ta ikateneng mo o ri,
S.PHON: ana! taŋ a, o~u ɕinɕi am, to~u maʨipaɻaŋi ɖo~u ɕiɕipɻo~ut na, ta ikatənəŋ mo~u o~u ɻi,
S.TRANSL: 喝！他是老師耶！怎麼可以跟老師搶棒子（教鞭）？你這樣怎麼會學到東西呢？
"Hey, He is a teacher! How dare you try to take a teacher's stick? How can you learn anything this way?

W.TRANSL: 虛.動綴.與人-拉扯-處焦.虛

S.FORM: "a ya mo i-pa-makbak!", "y-angay ko imo a lio-en do obo-wbot-an, do ta-taci-an",
S.PHON: "a ja mo~u i-pa-makbak!", "j-aŋaj ko~u imo~u a lio~u-ən ɖo~u o~ubo~u-wbo~ut-an, ɖo~u ta-taci-an",
S.FORM: "a ya mo ipamakbak!", "yangay ko imo a lioen do obowbotan, do tatacian",
S.PHON: "a ja mo~u ipamakbak!", "jaŋaj ko~u imo~u a lio~uən ɖo~u o~ubo~uwbo~utan, ɖo~u tataʨian",
S.TRANSL: ＂你為什麼打人！＂ ＂我要把你丟到便坑裡，小便池裡＂
"Why did you hit me?" "I'll throw you into the sewage tank!"

S.FORM: to na i a-lio-a yaken am, to na i pa-telem-a yaken am, to ko i ma-na-navak do rako a ranom a sombing no tao a,
S.PHON: to~u na i a-lio~u-a jakən am, to~u na i pa-tələm-a jakən am, to~u ko~u i ma-na-navak ɖo~u rako~u a rano~um a ʂo~umbiŋ no~u tao~u a,
S.FORM: to na i alioa yaken am, to na i patelema yaken am, to ko i mananavak do rako a ranom a sombing no tao a,
S.PHON: to~u na i alio~ua jakən am, to~u na i patələma jakən am, to~u ko~u i mananafak ɖo~u ɻako~u a ɻano~um a ʂo~umbiŋ no~u tao~u a,
S.TRANSL: 說著就把我丟到便坑的正中央去了
That's just what he did. He threw me into the middle of the sewage tank.

S.FORM: to ko na sabóy-a am, "ana! a ya s-om-agpian", ratateng am, to ko sabóy-a am, to-da a-cíwciw, ta o sinsin am to níwciw-a,
S.PHON: to~u ko~u na ʂab*j-a am, "ana! a ja ʂ-o~um-agpian", ratatəŋ am, to~u ko~u ʂab*j-a am, to~u-ɖa a-c*wciw, ta o~u ʂinʂin am to~u n*wciw-a,
S.FORM: to ko na saboya am, "ana! a ya somagpian", ratateng am, to ko saboya am, toda aciwciw, ta o sinsin am to niwciwa,
S.PHON: to~u ko~u na ʂabo~uja am, "ana! a ja ʂo~umagpian", ɻatatəŋ am, to~u ko~u ʂabo~uja am, to~uɖa aʨiwʨiw, ta o~u ɕinɕin am to~u niwʨiwa,
S.TRANSL: 我用手將便池的水潑向老師去。＂天啊！他瘋了。＂ 我再潑他一次，老師就嚇跑了。哪有人這樣對待（追跑）老師的？

After he threw me in, I sprayed him with the contents of the tank. "God, he's insane!" the teacher cried as he backed up. I sprayed him again, scaring the teacher away. How is it possible that a person would chase a teacher like that?

S.FORM: "ay, zakat-en ka ya an?" koan na yaken a, mi-ratateng am, "na, ciana, ta ya rana adoa ka vate-vatek a, há-hap rana o siken a, k-angay mo rana m-arios",
S.PHON: "aj, ʐakat-ən ka ja an?" ko~uan na jakən a, mi-ratatəŋ am, "na, ciana, ta ja rana aɖo~ua ka vatə-vatək a, ʁ*-ʁap rana o~u ʂikən a, k-aŋaj mo~u rana m-ario~uʂ",
S.FORM: "ay, zakaten ka ya an?" koan na yaken a, miratateng am, "na, ciana, ta ya rana adoa ka vatevatek a, hahap rana o siken a, kangay mo rana marios",
S.PHON: "aj, ɻakatən ka ja an?" ko~uan na jakən a, miɻatatəŋ am, "na, ʨiana, ta ja ɻana aɖo~ua ka fatəfatək a, ɰaɰap ɻana o~u ɕikən a, kaŋaj mo~u ɻana maɻio~uʂ",
S.TRANSL: 老師對我說＂唉，真想打死你！＂ 很久以後，老師說＂嗯，好了，已經過了兩個鐘頭了，給你肥皂去洗澡吧＂
"I really want to kill you," the teacher said. After a long time, the teacher finally said, "Okay, it's been two hours. Here's the soap. Now, go get a bath."

S.FORM: to ko mi-aw-áwat do vanoa no Imowrod a, "páka-rala rana!"
S.PHON: to~u ko~u mi-aw-*wat ɖo~u vano~ua no~u imo~uwro~uɖ a, "p*ka-rala rana!"
S.FORM: to ko miawawat do vanoa no Imowrod a, "pakarala rana!"
S.PHON: to~u ko~u miawawat ɖo~u fano~ua no~u imo~uwɻo~uɖ a, "pakaɻala ɻana!"
S.TRANSL: 我在紅頭村的港口一直游泳。＂好了，上來了！＂
I kept swimming at the harbor of Imowrod. "Okay, come on up!"

S.FORM: koan ko am, "ta! to ko maka-rala-i", a y-al-alaw ko sia,
S.PHON: ko~uan ko~u am, "ta! to~u ko~u maka-rala-i", a j-al-alaw ko~u ʂia,
S.FORM: koan ko am, "ta! to ko makaralai", a yalalaw ko sia,
S.PHON: ko~uan ko~u am, "ta! to~u ko~u makaɻalai", a jalalaw ko~u ɕia,
S.TRANSL: 我想＂我才不上岸呢！＂ 我只是想嚇嚇他的
"Why should I come up?" I thought. I wanted to scare him.

S.FORM: to ko nóvoz do wawa am, to ko a-atta-áttaw a mi-ta-tangay a, ka-ine-ynawa ko a,
S.PHON: to~u ko~u n*vo~uʐ ɖo~u wawa am, to~u ko~u a-atta-*ttaw a mi-ta-taŋaj a, ka-inə-jnawa ko~u a,
S.FORM: to ko novoz do wawa am, to ko aattaattaw a mitatangay a, kaineynawa ko a,
S.PHON: to~u ko~u no~ufo~uɻ ɖo~u wawa am, to~u ko~u aattaattaw a mitataŋaj a, kainəjnawa ko~u a,
S.TRANSL: 一下我又跳下海裡去，仰著浮在水上一動也不動，只有呼吸著
Again I jumped into the water and did the dead man's float.

S.FORM: tateng am, i-ká-law na yaken ni Makaiyawey am, to nóvoz rana am, to na i ngap-a yaken a,
S.PHON: tatəŋ am, i-k*-law na jakən ni makaijawəj am, to~u n*vo~uʐ rana am, to~u na i ŋap-a jakən a,
S.FORM: tateng am, ikalaw na yaken ni Makaiyawey am, to novoz rana am, to na i ngapa yaken a,
S.PHON: tatəŋ am, ikalaw na jakən ni makaijawəj am, to~u no~ufo~uɻ ɻana am, to~u na i ŋapa jakən a,
S.TRANSL: 後來si Makaiyawey老師很擔心我，就下水並把我拖回岸上
My teacher si Makaiyawey was worried and jumped down to bring me to shore.

S.FORM: tang, ta ji ko ngin-inawan am, to na ma-mingít-an yaken a, am-ian rana do tey-rala am, ji ko na nginawan a,
S.PHON: taŋ, ta ʥi ko~u ŋin-inawan am, to~u na ma-miŋ*t-an jakən a, am-ian rana ɖo~u təj-rala am, ʥi ko~u na ŋinawan a,
S.FORM: tang, ta ji ko ngininawan am, to na mamingitan yaken a, amian rana do teyrala am, ji ko na nginawan a,
S.PHON: taŋ, ta ʥi ko~u ŋininawan am, to~u na mamiŋitan jakən a, amian ɻana ɖo~u təjɻala am, ʥi ko~u na ŋinawan a,
S.TRANSL: 其實，老師在拖我上岸時我是有呼吸的，但上了岸之後，我就暫停呼吸
I was breathing, but as soon as he brought me to shore, I stopped breathing.

S.FORM: "a ya na to-da a-wakwak!", to ko ngile-ylamdám-a si Makaiyawey ito am, to ngáhah a m-alaw a.
S.PHON: "a ja na to~u-ɖa a-wakwak!", to~u ko~u ŋilə-jlamɖ*m-a ʂi makaijawəj ito~u am, to~u ŋ*ʁaʁ a m-alaw a.
S.FORM: "a ya na toda awakwak!", to ko ngileylamdama si Makaiyawey ito am, to ngahah a malaw a.
S.PHON: "a ja na to~uɖa awakwak!", to~u ko~u ŋiləjlamɖama ɕi makaijawəj ito~u am, to~u ŋaɰaɰ a malaw a.
S.TRANSL: ＂慘了，他死了！＂ ，他嚇得呼吸急促。而我在試探老師si Makaiyawey
"Oh, no, he's dead!" I had wanted to test my teacher si Makaiyawey's limits, and he was so scared that his breathing was rapid.

S.FORM: ma-níring sira o aro a ni-rakeh na a mi-vate-vatek a karoan namen am,
S.PHON: ma-n*riŋ ʂira o~u aro~u a ni-rakəʁ na a mi-vatə-vatək a karo~uan namən am,
S.FORM: maniring sira o aro a nirakeh na a mivatevatek a karoan namen am,
S.PHON: maniɻiŋ ɕiɻa o~u aɻo~u a niɻakəɰ na a mifatəfatək a kaɻo~uan namən am,
S.TRANSL: 我們很多的學長都說
A lot of the older students were saying,

S.FORM: "ángay kamo panci-an o mikalsong!", to da i manci-an a,
S.PHON: "*ŋaj kamo~u panci-an o~u mikalʂo~uŋ!", to~u ɖa i manci-an a,
S.FORM: "angay kamo pancian o mikalsong!", to da i mancian a,
S.PHON: "aŋaj kamo~u panʨian o~u mikalʂo~uŋ!", to~u ɖa i manʨian a,
S.TRANSL: ＂快去叫警察來＂ ，於是有一些人就去叫警察
"Go call the police!" so some people went.

S.FORM: to ngósok am, to-da a-nanat o velek na ni Makaiyawey, "a ya ni-ma-kongo ya?"
S.PHON: to~u ŋ*ʂo~uk am, to~u-ɖa a-nanat o~u vələk na ni makaijawəj, "a ja ni-ma-ko~uŋo~u ja?"
S.FORM: to ngosok am, toda ananat o velek na ni Makaiyawey, "a ya nimakongo ya?"
S.PHON: to~u ŋo~uʂo~uk am, to~uɖa ananat o~u fələk na ni makaijawəj, "a ja nimako~uŋo~u ja?"
S.TRANSL: 警員下來後，說＂他是怎麼了？＂ si Makaiyawey則嚇得心驚肉跳
After the police came, he asked, "What happened? Si Makaiyawey became very scared."

S.FORM: "ya ko ni-tahem do obo-wbot-an am, ángay rana parios do wawa, koan ko am, ya to-da angay do Jimataretarek ito am, ya to-da a-átta-attaw rana" koan na,
S.PHON: "ja ko~u ni-taʁəm ɖo~u o~ubo~u-wbo~ut-an am, *ŋaj rana pario~uʂ ɖo~u wawa, ko~uan ko~u am, ja to~u-ɖa aŋaj ɖo~u ʥimatarətarək ito~u am, ja to~u-ɖa a-*tta-attaw rana" ko~uan na,
S.FORM: "ya ko nitahem do obowbotan am, angay rana parios do wawa, koan ko am, ya toda angay do Jimataretarek ito am, ya toda aattaattaw rana" koan na,
S.PHON: "ja ko~u nitaɰəm ɖo~u o~ubo~uwbo~utan am, aŋaj ɻana paɻio~uʂ ɖo~u wawa, ko~uan ko~u am, ja to~uɖa aŋaj ɖo~u ʥimataɻətaɻək ito~u am, ja to~uɖa aattaattaw ɻana" ko~uan na,
S.TRANSL: ＂我是處罰他泡便池裡，後來叫他去海上洗澡，他就去Jimataretarek的海上漂了起來＂
"I punished him by making him stay in the sewage tank, then when I told him to get a bath, he went to the seas of Jimataretarek and just floated there."

S.FORM: "wo, apia ya, ji mang-avay jia si ama na, a kena o ya o anak na ni ama na" koan da, "a ji abo o akma sang".
S.PHON: "wo~u, apia ja, ʥi maŋ-avaj ʥia ʂi ama na, a kəna o~u ja o~u anak na ni ama na" ko~uan ɖa, "a ʥi abo~u o~u akma ʂaŋ".
S.FORM: "wo, apia ya, ji mangavay jia si ama na, a kena o ya o anak na ni ama na" koan da, "a ji abo o akma sang".
S.PHON: "wo~u, apia ja, ʥi maŋafaj ʥia ɕi ama na, a kəna o~u ja o~u anak na ni ama na" ko~uan ɖa, "a ʥi abo~u o~u akma ʂaŋ".
S.TRANSL: ＂喔，這怎麼辦？他父親會罵人呢，這是他僅有的孩子（獨生子）＂ ，＂不會有事的＂
"Oh, what can we do?" "His father will be angry because he is their only son!" "Everything will be all right."

S.FORM: ratateng am, to da miás-a o kazangangan ko am, ta ji ngian pa do dang so koysang a, to da angay-an yaken do koysang a,
S.PHON: ratatəŋ am, to~u ɖa mi*ʂ-a o~u kaʐaŋaŋan ko~u am, ta ʥi ŋian pa ɖo~u ɖaŋ ʂo~u ko~ujʂaŋ a, to~u ɖa aŋaj-an jakən ɖo~u ko~ujʂaŋ a,
S.FORM: ratateng am, to da miasa o kazangangan ko am, ta ji ngian pa do dang so koysang a, to da angayan yaken do koysang a,
S.PHON: ɻatatəŋ am, to~u ɖa miaʂa o~u kaɻaŋaŋan ko~u am, ta ʥi ŋian pa ɖo~u ɖaŋ ʂo~u ko~ujʂaŋ a, to~u ɖa aŋajan jakən ɖo~u ko~ujʂaŋ a,
S.TRANSL: 他們摸了摸我的胸口，然後把我帶去衛生所觀察，因為那時候已有衛生所了
At that time there was already a clinic. They touched my chest, and then took me to the clinic to be looked over.

S.FORM: "ta ya ji a-pia a, ya ji ngin-inawa a" ji ko mapa-cimi-cimit a,
S.PHON: "ta ja ʥi a-pia a, ja ʥi ŋin-inawa a" ʥi ko~u mapa-cimi-cimit a,
S.FORM: "ta ya ji apia a, ya ji ngininawa a" ji ko mapacimicimit a,
S.PHON: "ta ja ʥi apia a, ja ʥi ŋininawa a" ʥi ko~u mapaʨimiʨimit a,
S.TRANSL: ＂他還好啦，他還有氣息＂ 。我眼睛連眨一下都不眨
"He'll be all right because he's still breathing." I didn't even blink.

S.FORM: ratateng am, to ko ng-kakab rana am, "wo, ya rana apia" koan na ni Makaiyawey am,
S.PHON: ratatəŋ am, to~u ko~u ŋ-kakab rana am, "wo~u, ja rana apia" ko~uan na ni makaijawəj am,
S.FORM: ratateng am, to ko ngkakab rana am, "wo, ya rana apia" koan na ni Makaiyawey am,
S.PHON: ɻatatəŋ am, to~u ko~u ŋkakab ɻana am, "wo~u, ja ɻana apia" ko~uan na ni makaijawəj am,
S.TRANSL: 後來我就深深的呼了一口氣，＂喔，他好了！＂ si Makaiyawey叫著
After that I took a deep breath. si Makaiyawey shouted, "Oh, he's okay!"

S.FORM: "ya ka pia an? ya mo ka-teng-an yaken an" koan na yaken ni Makaiyawey
S.PHON: "ja ka pia an? ja mo~u ka-təŋ-an jakən an" ko~uan na jakən ni makaijawəj
S.FORM: "ya ka pia an? ya mo katengan yaken an" koan na yaken ni Makaiyawey
S.PHON: "ja ka pia an? ja mo~u katəŋan jakən an" ko~uan na jakən ni makaijawəj
S.TRANSL: si Makaiyawey問我＂你還好嗎？你知不知道我是誰？＂
"Are you all right? Do you know who I am?" si Makaiyawey asked me.

S.FORM: ji ko pa mi-zi-ziak a, m-ównay a ka-dengdeng-an so kanen am, "síno ka?" koan ko am,
S.PHON: ʥi ko~u pa mi-ʐi-ʐiak a, m-*wnaj a ka-ɖəŋɖəŋ-an ʂo~u kanən am, "ʂ*no~u ka?" ko~uan ko~u am,
S.FORM: ji ko pa miziziak a, mownay a kadengdengan so kanen am, "sino ka?" koan ko am,
S.PHON: ʥi ko~u pa miɻiɻiak a, mo~uwnaj a kaɖəŋɖəŋan ʂo~u kanən am, "ɕino~u ka?" ko~uan ko~u am,
S.TRANSL: 我沉默了好一會兒，大約是煮一鍋飯之久的時間，我才說＂你是誰？＂
I was silent for a while, about time enough to cook a pot of rice, then answered, "Who are you?"

S.FORM: "ya rana ma-viay" koan da no aro a ka-raray ko a, asa poo namen a mi-vate-vatek.
S.PHON: "ja rana ma-viaj" ko~uan ɖa no~u aro~u a ka-raraj ko~u a, aʂa po~uo~u namən a mi-vatə-vatək.
S.FORM: "ya rana maviay" koan da no aro a kararay ko a, asa poo namen a mivatevatek.
S.PHON: "ja ɻana mafiaj" ko~uan ɖa no~u aɻo~u a kaɻaɻaj ko~u a, aʂa po~uo~u namən a mifatəfatək.
S.TRANSL: 我的許多同學說＂他活了＂ 。當時我們學生大概有一百名左右吧
"He's alive," my classmates said. We had approximately 100 students.

S.FORM: mimín-en da yaken a cita-en a, "ta ji a-tey-mákey-ki-awat ori a, a to lang do jia a to na ngnéj-i,
S.PHON: mim*n-ən ɖa jakən a cita-ən a, "ta ʥi a-təj-m*kəj-ki-awat o~uri a, a to~u laŋ ɖo~u ʥia a to~u na ŋn*ʥ-i,
S.FORM: miminen da yaken a citaen a, "ta ji ateymakeykiawat ori a, a to lang do jia a to na ngneji,
S.PHON: miminən ɖa jakən a ʨitaən a, "ta ʥi atəjmakəjkiawat o~uɻi a, a to~u laŋ ɖo~u ʥia a to~u na ŋnəʥi,
S.TRANSL: 他們都過來看我，然後說＂其實他是個游泳高手，為什麼在這裡游泳會溺水？
"He's a strong swimmer, so how is it possible that he nearly drowned?" they all said that as they came to see me.

S.FORM: m-ównay am, ka-to ko rana ngin-inawa-n a, to ko rana nanek a,
S.PHON: m-*wnaj am, ka-to~u ko~u rana ŋin-inawa-n a, to~u ko~u rana nanək a,
S.FORM: mownay am, kato ko rana ngininawan a, to ko rana nanek a,
S.PHON: mo~uwnaj am, kato~u ko~u ɻana ŋininawan a, to~u ko~u ɻana nanək a,
S.TRANSL: 很久以後我就恢復正常呼吸，然後就自己站起來了
After a long time, I could breathe normally and stand by myself.

S.FORM: "wo, a ikong ya me-yngen jimo?", "ta ikong ya me-yngen?"
S.PHON: "wo~u, a iko~uŋ ja mə-jŋən ʥimo~u?", "ta iko~uŋ ja mə-jŋən?"
S.FORM: "wo, a ikong ya meyngen jimo?", "ta ikong ya meyngen?"
S.PHON: "wo~u, a iko~uŋ ja məjŋən ʥimo~u?", "ta iko~uŋ ja məjŋən?"
S.TRANSL: ＂喔！你哪裡痛嗎？＂ ＂我哪有什麼痛的？＂
"Oh! Does it hurt anywhere?" "What do you mean, 'does it hurt?'"

S.FORM: ratateng am, "no ya ka akma so sang a ya ni-k-amot-an am, to ka rana angay do ili nio", "nohon", to ko rana angay a.
S.PHON: ratatəŋ am, "no~u ja ka akma ʂo~u ʂaŋ a ja ni-k-amo~ut-an am, to~u ka rana aŋaj ɖo~u ili nio~u", "no~uʁo~un", to~u ko~u rana aŋaj a.
S.FORM: ratateng am, "no ya ka akma so sang a ya nikamotan am, to ka rana angay do ili nio", "nohon", to ko rana angay a.
S.PHON: ɻatatəŋ am, "no~u ja ka akma ʂo~u ʂaŋ a ja nikamo~utan am, to~u ka ɻana aŋaj ɖo~u ili nio~u", "no~uɰo~un", to~u ko~u ɻana aŋaj a.
S.TRANSL: 老師說＂好吧，今天你溺水了，就讓你先回家去休息吧＂ ，＂好＂ ，我就回家去了
"Okay, since you nearly drowned, you can go back home for today" the teacher said. "Okay." Just like that, and I was on my way home.

S.FORM: i-k-ási na yaken ni apen Sidongen ito am, to maci-lolo a,
S.PHON: i-k-*ʂi na jakən ni apən ʂiɖo~uŋən ito~u am, to~u maci-lo~ulo~u a,
S.FORM: ikasi na yaken ni apen Sidongen ito am, to macilolo a,
S.PHON: ikaɕi na jakən ni apən ɕiɖo~uŋən ito~u am, to~u maʨilo~ulo~u a,
S.TRANSL: 後來si apen Sidongen可憐我，就陪我一起回家去了
Si apen Sidongen took pity on me and went home with me.

S.FORM: ta do ili namen am, kena iya ori o map-apo-apo so ka-pi-aw-awat namen do ili namen",
S.PHON: ta ɖo~u ili namən am, kəna ija o~uri o~u map-apo~u-apo~u ʂo~u ka-pi-aw-awat namən ɖo~u ili namən",
S.FORM: ta do ili namen am, kena iya ori o mapapoapo so kapiawawat namen do ili namen",
S.PHON: ta ɖo~u ili namən am, kəna ija o~uɻi o~u mapapo~uapo~u ʂo~u kapiawawat namən ɖo~u ili namən",
S.TRANSL: 在我們村裡，他可是常常帶頭領我們去游泳呢！＂
"In our village he's always the first one to lead us in swimming."
